prerequisites.value: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, ability to cast make whole or mending.

description.value:
**Benefit:** When you craft a magic weapon, magic armor, or magic shield, you can add a fortifying element to the item. This increases the itemâs total construction cost by 10%. If itâs a weapon, when it becomes broken, the penalty to attack and damage rolls is reduced to â1 (this can never reduce a broken weaponâs penalty to attack and damage to 0 or a positive number). If itâs a suit of armor or a shield, when it becomes broken, the bonus it grants to AC is reduced by one-quarter, rounding down. Other drawbacks of the broken condition to weapons, armor, and shields still apply as normal.

**Normal:** A broken weapon imposes a â2 penalty on attack and damage rolls. The bonus a broken suit of armor or a broken shield grants to AC is halved.
